propositions: Add a 'non-gating test' antipattern flagging tests that silently skip or non-strict-xfail so they never run where CI gates, with fail-open only for environment-dependent conditions.
Add an 'unrealistic fault injection / sleep-only synchronization' antipattern flagging faults injected outside the seam under test and race tests synchronized only by a timing sleep.

Include false-positive guards so valid skips (optional platform/dependency), strict xfails with a concrete removal reason, real-boundary fault injection, and sleeps used as secondary settling waits are not flagged.

Extend the eval spec with recall cases (R-non-gating-skip, R-sleep-only-race, R-fault-wrong-seam) and no-fire cases (FP-strict-xfail-with-reason, FP-sleep-as-secondary), keeping recall/no-fire families balanced.
Keep front-matter, posture, thresholds, criteria routing, plan_review_E5.md, and the evidence-record contract block textually unchanged.
Reject the round-3 request for a live-model inference acceptance criterion because the eval runner is offline validate-only, retaining strict offline validation instead.
